name: Grilled Chicken Sandwich with Smoky Red-Onion Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 small red onion, cut into 4 slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat grill.
2. Make Smoky Red-Onion Salsa: Grill onion and tomato slices for 2 minutes per side. Chop coarsely and transfer to a bowl. Stir in remaining ingredients. Makes 2 cups.
3. Combine chili powder, cumin, and cracked black pepper in a small bowl. Rub the mixture over all sides of chicken.
4. Sprinkle with salt.
5. Grill chicken over medium-hot heat until cooked through, about 4 to 5 minutes per side. Grill bread for 30 to 60 seconds per side.
6. Top 4 bread slices with mayonnaise, lettuce, chicken, then salsa. Place remaining bread on top.
